explanation: This command attempts to invoke the Sysnative folder in a Windows environment, which is the focus of the Sigma rule. The use of quotes and command chaining is a safe mutation technique to test detection reliability.
This command uses PowerShell to start a process from the Sysnative folder. It demonstrates reordering and substitution (using PowerShell instead of direct execution) to test detection coverage.
A direct invocation of the Sysnative folder without additional obfuscation. This is the simplest form of the test command and helps establish baseline detection behavior.
